diagrams.title: PDA Formal Structure
diagrams.description: Box diagram showing all 7 components of a PDA and their relationships
elements: Transition function δ connecting input+stack to new state+stack
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete architecture of a Pushdown Automaton and understand how components interact

diagrams.title: Stack Operations Visualization
diagrams.description: Three scenarios: Push (add X), Pop (remove X), Replace (X → γ)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how each transition modifies the stack and the effect of replacing top symbol with a string

diagrams.title: Acceptance Methods Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of final state acceptance vs empty stack acceptance
elements: Final State Path showing entering F
Empty Stack Path showing popping Z₀
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the two acceptance mechanisms and when they succeed or fail

diagrams.title: PDA Transition Notation Explained
diagrams.description: Breakdown of transition (p, a, X) → (q, γ) showing each part
diagrams.purpose: Master the notation for reading and writing PDA transitions

visuals.title: Definition Of The Pushdown Automaton
visuals.description: Visual diagram for definition of the pushdown automaton
